scenes.description: Omaru Polka finishes performing 'Diamond Crevasse' solo.
Instrumental interlude and stage transition to the next performance.
Omaru Polka, Ookami Mio, and AZKi perform 'Paradise Lost'.

subtitles.original: 一人じゃないと
subtitles.english: That I'm not alone

subtitles.original: 囁いてほしい プラネット
subtitles.english: I want you to whisper, Planet

subtitles.original: Paradise Lost
subtitles.english: Paradise Lost

subtitles.original: 聖なる瞳が 痛みを映したら
subtitles.english: When holy eyes reflect the pain

subtitles.original: 振り向いてごらん 情熱放つトリック
subtitles.english: Turn around and see the trick that emits passion

subtitles.original: 崩れる足元 二人は戻れない
subtitles.english: With the ground crumbling, the two of us can't go back

subtitles.original: 差し伸べた手をほどかないで
subtitles.english: Don't let go of the hand I've reached out

subtitles.original: 消えるよまた 優しい日々が
subtitles.english: Once again, the gentle days disappear

subtitles.original: 思い出を汚すのは許さない
subtitles.english: I won't allow the memories to be defiled

subtitles.original: ここは裏切りのティル・ナ・ノーグ
subtitles.english: This is the Tir na nOg of betrayal

subtitles.original: 彷徨う心の果てに
subtitles.english: At the end of a wandering heart

subtitles.original: 光を求めて 祈る言葉届けあなたに
subtitles.english: Seeking light, may my prayerful words reach you

subtitles.original: 囚われの羽が 遥かな空へと向かう
subtitles.english: Captured wings head toward the distant sky

subtitles.original: 信じたいよ私たち 孤独じゃない
subtitles.english: I want to believe that we're not alone

subtitles.original: 分かり合える 絆の中で
subtitles.english: We can understand each other within our bond

subtitles.original: 離さない 始まるデスティニー
subtitles.english: I won't let go, the starting destiny

subtitles.original: 新たな願いに 鎖解ける時
subtitles.english: When the chains are broken by a new wish

subtitles.original: 休ませてくれる 深い眠りに
subtitles.english: Allow me to rest in a deep sleep

subtitles.original: 僅かな希望が 私を強くする
subtitles.english: A faint hope makes me strong

subtitles.original: ぬくもりに触れてみたいから
subtitles.english: Because I want to try touching the warmth

subtitles.original: 蘇れば 儚き命
subtitles.english: If it's resurrected, a fleeting life

subtitles.original: 繰り返す愛しさが導いた
subtitles.english: Guided by the repeated affection

subtitles.original: 胸に泡沫の調べ 流れる世界の終わりに
subtitles.english: A transient melody in my heart, at the end of a flowing world

subtitles.original: 諦めはしない 今がつなぐ明日探そう
subtitles.english: I won't give up, let's find the tomorrow that 'now' connects

subtitles.original: 千切れ舞う羽は 未来の空にも向かう
subtitles.english: The torn and dancing wings also head toward the future sky

subtitles.original: 忘れないで私たち 一つのクリスタル
subtitles.english: Don't forget, we are a single crystal

subtitles.original: 輝いて 壊れないのよ
subtitles.english: Shining, it won't break

subtitles.original: 離さない 誓いのデスティニー
subtitles.english: I won't let go, the destiny of a vow

subtitles.original: Lost Paradise...
subtitles.english: Lost Paradise...

subtitles.original: 消えるよまた 優しい日々が
subtitles.english: Once again, the gentle days disappear

subtitles.original: 思い出を汚すのは許さない
subtitles.english: I won't allow the memories to be defiled

subtitles.original: ここは裏切りのティル・ナ・ノーグ
subtitles.english: This is the Tir na nOg of betrayal

subtitles.original: 彷徨う心の果てに
subtitles.english: At the end of a wandering heart

subtitles.original: 光を求めて 祈る言葉届けあなたに
subtitles.english: Seeking light, may my prayerful words reach you

subtitles.original: 囚われの羽が 遥かな空へと向かう
subtitles.english: Captured wings head toward the distant sky

subtitles.original: 信じたいよ私たち 孤独じゃない
subtitles.english: I want to believe that we're not alone

subtitles.original: 分かり合える 絆の中で
subtitles.english: We can understand each other within our bond
